name: Bob Kauflin
title: Worship Leader & Author
tagline: Teaching the church to worship with both spirit and truth
bio: Director of worship development for Sovereign Grace Churches and a former member of the Christian band Glad. He is the author of 'Worship Matters' and 'True Worshipers,' influential books on biblical worship philosophy and practice. Kauflin has shaped worship theology and practice across the Reformed evangelical world.
faith: Kauflin's ministry is driven by the conviction that worship must be grounded in sound theology and empowered by the Holy Spirit. He has spent decades training worship leaders to prioritize God's glory over musical performance. His writing and teaching emphasize that true worship flows from a heart captivated by the gospel of Jesus Christ.

sources.title: Worship Matters
sources.note: By Bob Kauflin. A foundational book on leading worship to the glory of God
